description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish-evennia that automatically deploys the Evennia package to PyPI when a tag matching v* is pushed. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, set up Python 3.11, upgrade pip, install the build package, build a binary wheel and source tarball, and publish to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action with the PYPI_API_TOKEN from secrets.
